title: Living in Boulder vlog 11 -  21 -  2017: Irish Castles on Google Earth

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a late-night vlog update (2:24am) about his ongoing Google Earth castles project — cataloging castles by country. He explains a deleted freezing video, his progress through France/Germany/Ireland, and his plan to finish castles and cathedrals before linking them to his website by early December. He also mentions listening to Plato's Dialogues and plans to visit his brother over the upcoming Sunday.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Plato is the smartest of all the ancient philosophers and Kyle's favorite
Enjoyable and interesting, wants to finish castles and cathedrals by early December
Made a mistake uploading a frozen/corrupted video but caught it early since only two people saw it

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I uploaded a video to YouTube two nights ago but it was freezing during playback so I deleted it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was halfway through Irish castles in my video project.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I finished the journey part of my project by Sunday night.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to work on castles in India next.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to edit and verify some castle entries using Google search.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I will get help with castles in the UK and Italy.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to link the castle entries to my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might include archaeological sites in my project later.

claims.subject: Plato
claims.claim: Plato is my favorite smartest guy of all time.

claims.subject: Plato
claims.claim: I've been reading Plato's Dialogues, specifically about the fantasy city-state with 5,048 people and its laws.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: There are over 300 castles in France, and many are located in mountainous areas.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to visit my brother soon, who recently got a house.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I aim to finish the castle project by the beginning of December.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to start doing YouTube videos again around December 15th, exactly one year after I began my project.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to sleep now because I have to wake up early for a picnic.
